entities.name: ANTIXENOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of plant resistance involving the non-preference of a pest for a host plant

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of plant resistance that adversely affects the biology, survival, or reproduction of the pest

entities.name: SPOTTED STEM BORER
entities.description: The insect pest Chilo partellus that attacks sorghum

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The agricultural crop being evaluated for resistance to stem borer infestation

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The controlled environmental setting used to study the expression of resistance

entities.name: SEEDLING STAGE
entities.description: The early growth phase of the sorghum plant during which resistance mechanisms were studied

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of sorghum genotypes to resist attack by the spotted stem borer through antixenosis and antibiosis
